games.name: Counter-Strike 2
games.notes: Highly optimized for competitive play. Keep in-game settings low to maximize FPS. Stream at 60fps.

games.name: Dota 2
games.notes: Very easy to stream. Top-down view requires moderate bitrate to prevent text blur.

games.name: Apex Legends
games.notes: Fast-paced movement requires high bitrate (6000+ Kbps) to prevent pixelation during slides and jumps.

games.name: Cyberpunk 2077
games.notes: Extremely demanding on both CPU and GPU. Hardware encoding (NVENC/AMF) is mandatory to stream without stuttering.

games.name: Grand Theft Auto V
games.notes: Older game, easily streamable on modern hardware. FiveM mods may increase CPU usage.

games.name: Valorant
games.notes: Designed to run on potatoes. Extremely easy to stream at 1080p60 on almost any dedicated GPU.

games.name: Helldivers 2
games.notes: Heavy particle effects and explosions require high bitrate and solid GPU headroom. Use upscaling (DLSS/FSR) in-game.

games.name: Palworld
games.notes: Open world loading can cause stuttering. Install on SSD. NVENC handles the colorful graphics well.

games.name: Rust
games.notes: Notoriously CPU and RAM heavy. Highly recommend hardware encoding to save CPU resources.

games.name: Elden Ring
games.notes: Locked at 60fps in-game. Dark areas in caves require high bitrate to avoid severe compression artifacts.
